Video.summary: It's the final day of group stage matches on Super Sunday in the World Pickleball League (WPBL) as game Number Six features Pune United battling the Hyderabad Superstars.This is an important game for both teams as they fight for the last remaining spots in the semi-finals.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 2

Video.summary: This championship game highlights the strategic play, including lobs and speed-ups, as both teams battle for the gold. A key dynamic of this match is that Courter and Carter had the advantage of playing under the shaded court conditions just before, while Dawson and Williams were coming from outside. Jen Dawson is noted as being a seasoned player on this court, having a triple crown in the Senior Pro divisions.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams
US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams
US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams

Video.summary: Megan Fudge and Karin Kochis take on Ryann Foster and Lee Whitwell in this Women's Split Pro Doubles semifinal match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Split Pro Doubles - Semifinal

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Split Pro Doubles - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Split Pro Doubles - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Split Pro Doubles - Semifinal

Video.summary: NCPA Semifinals: Virginia Tech takes on Utah Tech in the 2025 NCPA Championships from Las Vegas.
Video.title: NCPA Semifinals: Virginia Tech vs. Utah Tech

Image.alt: NCPA Semifinals: Virginia Tech vs. Utah Tech
NCPA Semifinals: Virginia Tech vs. Utah Tech
NCPA Semifinals: Virginia Tech vs. Utah Tech

Video.summary: Watch a thrilling Mixed Pro Doubles pickleball match between the top-seeded team of Megan Fudge and Jack Munro against Peichuan Kao and Ryler DeHeart. Megan Fudge is a highly-ranked professional player who previously played tennis at the University of Illinois, where she met her husband and partner, Ryler DeHeart. DeHeart is a former professional tennis player who is left-handed. Their opponents are Peichuan Kao, a professional pickleball player who won gold at the APP Fort Lauderdale Open, and Jack Munro, a young pro who was the youngest to become a professional at age 12.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Kao/DeHeart vs. Fudge/Munro

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Kao/DeHeart vs. Fudge/Munro
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Kao/DeHeart vs. Fudge/Munro
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Kao/DeHeart vs. Fudge/Munro

Video.title: NPL - Stingers vs United (Mens)

NPL - Stingers vs United (Mens)
NPL - Stingers vs United (Mens)

Video.summary: Christine Karges and David Weinbach take on Lee Whitwell and Jaime Oncins in this Mixed Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match

Video.summary: The high-voltage group stage of the World Pickleball League (WPL) nears its end on Day 8 with a crucial tie between the Hyderabad Superstars and the Chennai Super Champs. The commentary team sets the stage for a tense match, which is determined by an incredibly close final scoreline and points difference, with all six teams still in the running for the four semi-final spots. Also witness the Exhibition Match of the Century featuring Bollywood superstars Aamir Ali (Team Aamir) and Ali Fazal (Team Ali), live from the CCI Brabourne Stadium.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1 + Bollywood Exhibition Match

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1 + Bollywood Exhibition Match
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1 + Bollywood Exhibition Match
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1 + Bollywood Exhibition Match

Video.summary: Anna Leigh Waters and Leigh Waters take on Allison Harris and Simone Jardim in this Women's Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match

Video.summary: Get ready for thrilling Pro Men's Doubles pickleball action from the Minto US Open Pickleball Championships at East Naples Community Park, the National Pickleball Center! This semi-final match features the dynamic duo of Richard Livornese Jr. and Ryler Deheart against the formidable team of Ben Newell and Brandon Lane. Witness incredible rallies, aggressive plays, and strategic dinks as these top players battle it out for a spot in Championship Saturday. Don't miss this high-energy competition from the epicenter of pickleball!
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Livornese/Deheart vs. Lane/Newell

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Livornese/Deheart vs. Lane/Newell
US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Livornese/Deheart vs. Lane/Newell
US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Livornese/Deheart vs. Lane/Newell

Video.summary: Lily Kordic and Kara Williams take on Nathalie Bagby and Natalija Shaw in this Women's Senior Pro Gold Medal Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League Season 2 continues its high-energy opening day at the Jio World Garden in Mumbai with a star-studded clash between Delhi Dilwale and the Chennai Super Champs. Watch as international stars like Delhi’s Max "Purple Jesus" Manthao and Chennai’s Hwang Nam Lee—a former Wimbledon junior doubles champion—bring world-class precision to the court. With celebrity co-owner Samantha cheering from the sidelines and strategic masterclasses from coach Wesley Gabrielsson, this tie features a gauntlet of intense Women’s Singles, Men's Singles, and high-speed Doubles matches. Experience every "Ernie" shot, tactical "pickle play," and the longest video challenge in league history as these two powerhouse teams battle for early-season dominance.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2

Video.summary: Tune in for a high-energy match between the Gilbert Gladiators and the Tempe Tornadoes at The Orchard in Scottsdale, Arizona. This April 25, 2023 episode of Tuesday Night Pickleball features fast-paced action and strategic plays as both teams battle it out in a pivotal match. With sharp shots, effective communication, and critical moments, the Gladiators and Tornadoes go head-to-head for a thrilling finish. Watch as the teams showcase their pickleball prowess in one of the most exciting events of the AZ PBL season.
Video.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball 2023 – AZ PBL Team Match – Gladiators vs Tornadoes

Image.alt: Tuesday Night Pickleball 2023 – AZ PBL Team Match – Gladiators vs Tornadoes
Tuesday Night Pickleball 2023 – AZ PBL Team Match – Gladiators vs Tornadoes
Tuesday Night Pickleball 2023 – AZ PBL Team Match – Gladiators vs Tornadoes

Video.summary: March 21, 2023 - the Peoria Pythons and Scottsdale Scorchers play a fierce game of pickleball - live at The Orchard!

NCPA Championship: Utah Tech vs. Utah Valley

Video.summary: Live from the NCPA Indiana Regional 2025, watch a thrilling collegiate pickleball battle between Purdue University and Creighton University. Tied at 2-2 entering the broadcast, this match features intense mixed doubles action that decides the series.Key matchups include Purdue’s Emma Jones and Jay Barath facing off against Creighton’s Russell Lee and Lucy. Later, Purdue’s Caleb Young and Tammy Lamb take on Creighton’s Noah Wodzinski and Elizabeth Cook.
Video.title: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Purdue vs. Creighton

Image.alt: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Purdue vs. Creighton
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Purdue vs. Creighton
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Purdue vs. Creighton

Video.summary: The 2023 English Open Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final brings serious heat as Ryler DeHeart and Megan Fudge square off against Nick Petterson and Susannah Barr. This final showcases elite shot-making, smart stacking strategies, and seamless teamwork from both sides of the net.With momentum shifting and nerves running high, every rally counts. From laser-focused drives to perfectly timed poaches, this match is a clinic in competitive mixed doubles and a thrilling conclusion to the Open division.
Video.title: English Open 2023 – Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final – DeHeart & Fudge vs Petterson & Barr

Image.alt: English Open 2023 – Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final – DeHeart & Fudge vs Petterson & Barr
English Open 2023 – Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final – DeHeart & Fudge vs Petterson & Barr
English Open 2023 – Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final – DeHeart & Fudge vs Petterson & Barr

Video.summary: October 28, 2023 - It's the English Nationals Open in the Bolton Arena, Greater Manchester. Teams face off to compete for victory!

Video.summary: The episode kicks off with the women's singles match, where the Miami team battles it out against the Fort Myers Flamingos. The focus shifts to men's singles in the second half of the game, highlighting the veteran Miami team and their notable chemistry on the court. Tune in to see key plays, player highlights, and team strategy.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Video.summary: This episode of the All Florida Pro League (AFPL) Stop 4 in Sarasota, Florida, features a redemption match between the Sarasota Manatees and the Lakeland Palms. Both teams are coming off a loss and are looking for a win in this intense doubles matchup. The Manatees jump out to an early lead, but the Palms, with strong play from players like Ava and Ashley Griffith, manage to crawl back into the game and make it a nail-biting finish. The episode features courtside commentary from Jay Carroll and Hugh Greene.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 5 - Sarasota Manatees vs. Lakeland Palms

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 5 - Sarasota Manatees vs. Lakeland Palms
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 5 - Sarasota Manatees vs. Lakeland Palms
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 5 - Sarasota Manatees vs. Lakeland Palms
